description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines a deploy_production job in the deploy stage, runs only on the master branch and must be triggered manually. The job executes the following shell commands in order: apt-get update -qy; echo "deb http://toolbelt.heroku.com/ubuntu ./" > /etc/apt/sources.list.d/heroku.list; wget -O- https://toolbelt.heroku.com/apt/release.key | apt-key add -; apt-get update; apt-get install -y heroku-toolbelt ruby-dev; gem install dpl; dpl --provider=heroku --app=backend-expenses-tracker --api-key=$HEROKU_API_KEY; and heroku run python manage.py migrate --exit-code --app backend-expenses-tracker. No Docker image or services are specified, and no caches or artifacts are used. The pipeline deploys the backend-expenses-tracker app to Heroku using the dpl gem and runs database migrations after deployment.
